commands: vp exec -F app-a -- echo hello # -F short flag for --filter
vp exec -F app-a -F lib-c -- echo hello # -F short flag multiple
vp exec -F 'app-*' -- echo hello # -F short flag with glob
vp exec --filter 'app-a lib-c' -- node -e "console.log(process.env.VP_PACKAGE_NAME)" # whitespace splitting: 'a b' => two filters
vp exec --filter 'app-a  app-b' -- node -e "console.log(process.env.VP_PACKAGE_NAME)" # whitespace splitting with extra spaces
vp exec --filter nonexistent-pkg -- echo hello # unmatched filter warning
vp exec --fail-if-no-match --filter nonexistent-pkg -- echo hello # unmatched filter strict error
vp exec --fail-if-no-match --filter nonexistent-pkg --filter app-a -- echo hello # unmatched + matched strict error
vp exec --fail-if-no-match --filter nope1 --filter nope2 -- echo hello # multiple unmatched strict error
vp exec --fail-if-no-match --filter app-a -- echo hello # strict succeeds when filter matches
vp exec --filter nonexistent-pkg --filter app-a -- node -e "console.log(process.env.VP_PACKAGE_NAME)" # unmatched + matched filter
vp exec -w --filter app-a -- node -e "console.log(process.env.VP_PACKAGE_NAME)" # -w + --filter is additive (root + filtered)
vp exec -w --filter 'app-*' -- node -e "console.log(process.env.VP_PACKAGE_NAME)" # -w + glob filter additive
vp exec -r --filter app-a -- echo hello # -r + --filter conflict error
